title: Enjoy Ciutadella — free heritage walks
description: Ciutadella's municipal tourism service shows off the town's identity unhurriedly and at no cost: a creative route among artisans, the coastline facing the sea, a starlit-sky night walk and local produce. The cycle runs June to October with several weekly routes; places are limited and require prior booking at ajciutadella.org, where each week's timetable is published.
